arrival.text: Immediately after making your reservation, you MUST call Logan Airport Parking Services at 781-816-0168 to schedule vehicle pick-up at your airline's departing terminal (curbside) and provide other important details to the reservationist.
When arriving at your terminal, have your SpotHero reservation handy.  Show the valet associate and head to your flight.

departure.text: Please call this facility to schedule your curbside pick up: 617-791-1110.
When you are ready to go, you may simply leave!

common.title: Logan Airport Parking Services - Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: This curbside valet service is operated by Logan Airport Parking Services. With this service, you will drive directly to the airport and meet the valet attendant at your departure terminal.
restrictions: Premium Curbside Valet Service! NO SHUTTLE, NO PARKING LOTS AND NO PARKING GARAGES to deal with.
To avoid any delays with your parking experience, please book this option at least 24 hours in advance to confirm your arrival.

While other curb-side valet parking services may actually just be shuttle buses to and from the airport, Logan Airport Parking Services is a true curbside valet service offering drop-off and pickup of your vehicle directly in front of your terminal.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.

common.title: 121 Liverpool St. - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on Liverpool Street. Look for the number signs for 121 Liverpool Street. If you do not see the number 121 at the entrance in addition to the SpotHero Scan to Pay sign, you have parked in the neighbors lot. The correct parking area is directly across from 152 Liverpool Street. Please reference all pictures to make sure you are in the correct lot. This is the larger of the two parking lots.
restrictions: Look for the number signs for 121 Liverpool Street. If you do not see the number 121 at the entrance in addition to the SpotHero Scan to Pay sign, you have parked in the neighbors lot. The correct parking area is directly across from 152 Liverpool Street. Please reference all pictures to make sure you are in the correct lot. This is the larger of the two parking lots.
TD GARDEN EVENTS – Take the MBTA Maverick Station (Blue Line) to get to the TD Garden. You can walk from Aquarium or take the Orange Line to North Station.

This location is a 1.5 mile drive to Logan Airport and less than 1 mile walk to the FREE AIRPORT SHUTTLE located at the Airport MBTA Station. This location is a short walk to the East Boston waterfront, Tall Ship, Reel House, Mida and Smoke Shop Restaurants. Look for the number signs for 121 Liverpool Street. If you do not see the number 121 at the entrance in addition to the SpotHero Scan to Pay sign, you have parked in the neighbors lot. The correct parking area is directly across from 152 Liverpool Street. Please reference all pictures to make sure you are in the correct lot. This is the larger of the two parking lots.

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader, and the gate will open. Do NOT pull a ticket, please.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Hop on the Silver line via the Silver Line Way stop to BOS! Or Call a taxi or ride share service to the airport.

departure.text: Upon your return to the airport, collect your luggage and you can hop on the Silver line at Terminal E (arrivals level) back! Or you can call a taxi or ride share service back to the garage.
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: Beach Street Garage - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 40 Beach St. This is the Beach Street Garage - BOS - Covered Self Park garage, operated by SP+. It is located on the North/Right-hand side of Beach St. (a one-way street) between Harrison Ave. and Knapp St.
restrictions: Height restriction: 7' 9"
Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.

Walk 0.2 mile (3 minutes) to the Chinatown Train Station - Ride the Orange Line Northbound for 1 stop - Switch to the Red Line to South Station - Then take the SL1 (Silver Line # 1) direct to the airport.
You ca walk 0.5 miles (9 minutes) to Rowes Wharf and hop on the water taxi direct to the airport.
You may walk 0.4 miles (7 minutes) to South Station Train Terminal and then take the SL1 (Silver Line # 1) direct to the airport.

arrival.text: When you arrive, pull up to gate, you will be greeted by a valet attendant. Provide your SpotHero rental ID to the attendant. Valet will take your keys and park your vehicle.

At check in you will be provided a numbered QR Coded valet ticket, along with an E-Parking Text confirming your valet ticket#. Staff will direct you to the shuttle and assist you with loading your luggage. The shuttle runs 24/7/365, every 30 minutes.

departure.text: Upon your return, the shuttle is ON DEMAND. Simply use your E-Parking Text to request the shuttle or call 781-520-6145 and provide your valet ticket# to attendant. Your vehicle will be ready to go.
Retrieve your keys, and simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Park N Boston Logan Airport - Uncovered Valet
common.operator_display_name: Park N Boston Logan Airport Parking
common.navigation_tip: 30 RAILROAD ST: REVERE, MASS Lot is located on route to Boston Logan Airport. Take Route 1A ( Lee Burbank Hwy) towards Logan Airport , take a right onto RAILROAD STREET. Lot is 6 minutes from Boston Logan Airport.
restrictions: 1) Located 6 minutes from Boston Logan Airport.
2) LOT OFFERS: Valet Parking & a FREE Courtesy Shuttle every 30 minutes to Boston Logan Airport. Shuttle runs 24 Hours a day-7 Days a week-365 Days a year.

3) Pick Up Trucks, Oversized SUV’s & Vans are subject to the OVERSIZE RATE of an additional $10 per day. If the OVERSIZE RATE is not paid when booking, the additional $10 per day will be collected by lot at check-in.
4) FREE Wi-Fi!
5) Dog Friendly, up to 35 pounds, FLAT CHARGE of $20 collected at lot.
6) The parking lot is OPEN and staffed 24 hours a day.
7) Shuttle buses and utility vans NOT accepted at this location.

arrival.text: After booking, you must confirm your reservation by completing this form: http://broadwaymotorsrevere.com/confirm-self-park
Upon arrival at the lot, you must leave your keys in the Drop box near the yellow post.

We've teamed up with Patriot Taxi, a shuttle service that charges a flat rate of $16 from Broadway Motors Revere. We suggest you call them ahead of time to make sure they'll be there when you arrive. You can reach them at (781) 284-2222 or you may arrange for your own taxi, rideshare, or other mode of transportation to the airport.

departure.text: When you return from your trip, you may contact our taxi partner, Patriot Taxi, to arrange for a ride back to your vehicle. You may also arrange your own taxi or rideshare.
Once you return to your vehicle, you are free to go!

restrictions: If there are no attendants present when you return to collect your keys, please call (978)-684-9254 and someone will be there right away.
Height restriction: 6' 4"
You may also call (781) 520-0762 as a backup number if you need on-site assistance.

departure.text: When you return and have your lugguage, call the hotel at (781) 485-3600 to arrange on-demand return shuttle pickup.

common.title: Comfort Inn - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: Comfort Inn & Suites - Boston Logan Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 85 American Legion Hwy. This is the Comfort Suites Boston Airport lot. It is located on the east side of American Legion Hwy north of VFW Pkwy. Please note you can only access this location traveling north on American Legion Hwy.
restrictions: By parking at Comfort Inn Boston, you acknowledge that the Hotel does not provide any security personnel to oversee activities at the Lot and that your vehicle will be parked in the Lot at your sole risk and expense.

Shuttle service to BOS is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle departs every 30 minutes (1pm, 1:30pm, etc). When you return to BOS, please call (781) 485-3600 to arrange return shuttle pickup. The return shuttle runs on-demand 24/7.

arrival.text: Fill out this form to log your license plate into our system. Self Park in the available spaces in front of the building. There are signs. http://broadwaymotorsrevere.com/confirm-self-park-961-broadway *Without filling out this form, your reservation will not be in our system and will not be valid.*
The drop-off location for your car is 961 Broadway Saugus, MA.
Find parking as you enter on the right side, numbered parking spaces.

Getting to the Airport:

• No shuttle is provided from this lot.

• Use Uber or Lyft — rides usually cost $30–$40 one-way.

• Your driver can pick you up directly at the lot entrance.

departure.text:
Getting to the Airport:

• No shuttle is provided from this lot.

• Use Uber or Lyft — rides usually cost $30–$40 one-way.

• Your driver can pick you up directly at the lot entrance.

When You Return:

• Use Uber or Lyft to return to the lot.

• Your car will be exactly where you left it.

• Just get in and go — you’re done!
